_publications._publicationTitle: Genetic modifiers of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated café-au-lait macule count identified using multi-platform analysis.

_contextSnippet: SNP rs4660761 [A/G] is located in an active promoter region and an unmethylated CpG island (CGI) upstream of the gene ATP6V0B in normal penile foreskin melanocytes, fibroblasts and keratinocytes
details: Successfully visualized genome regions and regulatory domains for ATP6V0B and DPH2 genes, showing SNP rs4660761 location in active promoter region and unmethylated CpG island
